subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou beholdest the Wronged One bewildered in His affair whenever I reveal that which Thou didst enjoin upon me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی تری المظلوم متحیراً فی امره کلما اظهرت ما امرتنی به
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @proclamation to the people of the world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
